hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
# OK cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/applications/content_server/resources_3 cp WoRMS.tar.gz WoRMS.bak2.tar.gz # to backup WoRMS.tar.gz
cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/update_resources/connectors
# JUST A UTILITY. This one you'll need to edit the PHP file and enter wich taxon file you want to process. Not part of operation. ###php gen_higherClass.php # NOT PART of main operation.
# OK1: This will remove MoF & Association and Occurrence records where occurrence!taxonID does not exist in taxon.tab # This will also remove MoF children /terms/locality where value is not URI. # source is WoRMS.tar.gz # generates WoRMS_cleaned.tar.gz php remove_MoF_for_taxonID.php _ '{"resource_id": "WoRMS", "resource": "remove_MoF_for_taxonID", "resource_name": ""}' #OK
# OK2: It is what it is: bring back WoRMS.tar.gz cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/applications/content_server/resources_3 cp WoRMS_cleaned.tar.gz WoRMS.tar.gz ls -lt WoRMS_cleaned.tar.gz ls -lt WoRMS.tar.gz rm -f WoRMS_cleaned.tar.gz cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/update_resources/connectors
# OK3: This will add higherClassification in taxon.tab and rebuild the DwCA. With carry-over of other extensions. # No parentID but has ancestry, though limited still. # generates WoRMS-with-hC.tar.gz php dwca_utility.php _ '{"resource_id": "WoRMS", "task": "gen_hC_using_ancestry"}'
# OK4: This use gnparser one name at a time. Not entire file. # generates WoRMS-with-hC_neo4j_1.tar.gz php run_gnparser_dwca.php _ '{"resource_id": "WoRMS-with-hC"}' #gen neo4j_1
# OK5: Start matching taxa # generates WoRMS-with-hC_neo4j_2.tar.gz # Here is version for Zenodo. Next versions are for importing to Neo4j. php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "WoRMS-with-hC_neo4j_1", "AncestryIndexVer": "new"}' #OK gen +_eolID
# OK6: Convert taxon.tab, use EOLid value for taxonID. # REMINDER: Multiple scinames with different taxonIDs may have the same canonical thus will have the same EOLid # Reminder: All taxonID is now EOLid. Images from Media tab now excluded. # generates WoRMS_final.tar.gz php use_EOLid_as_taxonID.php _ '{"resource_id": "WoRMS-with-hC_neo4j_1_eolID"}' # gen WoRMS_finale
php analyze_MoF.php _ '{"resource_id": "WoRMS_finale"}'
# rename cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/applications/content_server/resources_3 cp WoRMS_finale.tar.gz WoRMS_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz ls -lt WoRMS_finale.tar.gz ls -lt WoRMS_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz rm -f WoRMS_finale.tar.gz
